steps.title: Identify the question type
steps.content: This is a function question. We must determine what role the underlined sentence "Bitter's feet were singing the news" plays in the passage as a whole.

steps.title: Reason toward the answer
steps.content: The sentence right before says "that was how Jam knew the painting was done" — meaning the footsteps communicated information to Jam. The underlined sentence reinforces this idea by personifying the feet as "singing the news," emphasizing that the footsteps convey a message to Jam.

steps.title: Eliminate the wrong choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Jam is more interested in music than in art': misreads the figurative "singing" as literal music; the passage never compares Jam's interests. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Bitter always sings when working on a painting': takes "singing" literally and overreaches with "always"; it is the feet, not Bitter, that figuratively sing. ✗
  • Choice D — 'describes Aloe's reaction upon seeing the painting': Aloe is not a focus here, and the sentence describes Bitter's feet, not Aloe's reaction. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
